[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 001011000 3
1 101011100 5
2 110111111 8
3 110111101 7
4 110111111 8
5 110111101 7
6 111101011 7
7 101100011 5

01 100000110 3
12 010100001 3
23 000000010 1
34 000010100 2
45 011101000 4
56 100000000 1
67 001000011 3
70 000100000 1

02 010000001 2
13 000000000 a
24 000010110 3
35 010111100 5
46 110100000 3
57 000000011 2
60 001000000 1
71 100000100 2

03 000000010 1
14 000010000 1
25 000011100 3
36 110110100 5
47 001000001 2
50 000000000 a
61 001000010 2
72 010100000 2

37 000000001 1

73 000000000 a
